title: 03.27.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: March 27, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: 03.27.26 Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for March 20, 2026 through March 26, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memorandum transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of March 20–26, 2026. It includes public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail individual requestors, request types, and reference numbers across police, fire, and general public records categories.
fields.key_stats: The public records request log spans at least 14 pages and includes requests filed from March 20–21, 2026, covering categories such as police reports, background requests, traffic accidents, body worn camera video, fire prevention records, building plans/permits, 911 dispatch logs, and more. A single requestor (Eilish Barnes) submitted at least 12 background requests on March 20, 2026.

projects: Weekly Code Enforcement Service Requests Report
